issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for API calls and theme development.

scenarios.name: staff-editable-hero-section
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented {% schema %} block with image_picker/text/richtext/url settings, presets for theme editor insertion, and section.settings.image | image_url: width: 1920 — baseline writes a Liquid section but misses the schema typing/presets pattern that makes it admin-editable.

scenarios.name: ajax-cart-add-without-reload
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits the skill's exact fetch('/cart/add.js') with JSON body { items: [{ id: variantId, quantity }] } plus /cart/change.js and /cart.js helpers; baseline often uses older form-encoded id/quantity payload rather than the items-array shape.
